Enum Class OllamaModel

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<OllamaModel>
org.springframework.ai.ollama.api.OllamaModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<OllamaModel>, Constable, ChatModelDescription, ModelDescription
public enum OllamaModel extends Enum<OllamaModel> implements ChatModelDescription
Helper class for common Ollama models.
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Siarhei Blashuk, Thomas Vitale, Sun Yuhan

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    CODELLAMA
    Code Llama is based on Llama 2 model
    DOLPHIN_PHI
    The 2.7B uncensored Dolphin model
    GEMMA
    Gemma is a lightweight model with 2 billion and 7 billion
    GEMMA3
    The current, most capable model that runs on a single GPU.
    LLAMA2
    Llama 2 is a collection of language models ranging from 7B to 70B parameters.
    LLAMA2_UNCENSORED
    Uncensored Llama 2 model
    LLAMA3
    Llama 3 is a collection of language models ranging from 8B and 70B parameters.
    LLAMA3_1
    The 8B language model from Meta.
    LLAMA3_2
    The Llama 3.2 3B language model from Meta.
    LLAMA3_2_1B
    The Llama 3.2 1B language model from Meta.
    LLAMA3_2_3B
    The Llama 3.2 3B language model from Meta.
    LLAMA3_2_VISION_11b
    The Llama 3.2 Vision 11B language model from Meta.
    LLAMA3_2_VISION_90b
    The Llama 3.2 Vision 90B language model from Meta.
    LLAVA
    Llava is a Large Language and Vision Assistant model
    MISTRAL
    The 7B parameters model
    MISTRAL_NEMO
    A 12B model with 128k context length, built by Mistral AI in collaboration with NVIDIA.
    MOONDREAM
    A small vision language model designed to run efficiently on edge devices.
    MXBAI_EMBED_LARGE
    State-of-the-art large embedding model from mixedbread.ai
    NEURAL_CHAT
    A fine-tuned Mistral model
    NOMIC_EMBED_TEXT
    A high-performing open embedding model with a large token context window.
    ORCA_MINI
    Orca Mini is based on Llama and Llama 2 ranging from 3 billion parameters to 70 billion
    PHI
    The Phi-2 2.7B language model
    PHI3
    The Phi-3 3.8B language model
    QWEN_2_5_3B
     
    QWEN_2_5_7B
    Qwen 2.5
    QWEN_3_06B
    Qwen3 0.6b
    QWEN_3_1_7_B
    Qwen3 1.7b
    QWEN2_5_VL
    Flagship vision-language model of Qwen and also a significant leap from the previous Qwen2-VL.
    QWEN3_4B
    Qwen3 4B
    QWEN3_4B_THINKING
    Qwen3 4B with thinking support.
    QWEN3_7B
    Qwen3 is the latest generation of large language models in Qwen series, offering a comprehensive suite of dense and mixture-of-experts (MoE) models.
    QWEN3_EMBED_8B
    A multilingual text embedding model with 8B parameters.
    QWQ
    QwQ is the reasoning model of the Qwen series.
    STARLING_LM
    Starling-7B model

  • Enum Constant Details

    • QWEN_2_5_3B

      public static final OllamaModel QWEN_2_5_3B

    • QWEN_2_5_7B

      public static final OllamaModel QWEN_2_5_7B
      Qwen 2.5

    • QWEN2_5_VL

      public static final OllamaModel QWEN2_5_VL
      Flagship vision-language model of Qwen and also a significant leap from the previous Qwen2-VL.

    • QWEN3_7B

      public static final OllamaModel QWEN3_7B
      Qwen3 is the latest generation of large language models in Qwen series, offering a comprehensive suite of dense and mixture-of-experts (MoE) models.

    • QWEN3_4B

      public static final OllamaModel QWEN3_4B
      Qwen3 4B

    • QWEN3_4B_THINKING

      public static final OllamaModel QWEN3_4B_THINKING
      Qwen3 4B with thinking support. This variant auto-enables thinking by default in Ollama 0.12+, providing separate reasoning traces in the response.
      See Also:
      • OllamaChatOptions.thinkOption

    • QWEN_3_1_7_B

      public static final OllamaModel QWEN_3_1_7_B
      Qwen3 1.7b

    • QWEN_3_06B

      public static final OllamaModel QWEN_3_06B
      Qwen3 0.6b

      public static final OllamaModel QWQ
      QwQ is the reasoning model of the Qwen series.

      Llama 2 is a collection of language models ranging from 7B to 70B parameters.

      Llama 3 is a collection of language models ranging from 8B and 70B parameters.

    • LLAMA3_1

      public static final OllamaModel LLAMA3_1
      The 8B language model from Meta.

      The Llama 3.2 1B language model from Meta.

      The 7B parameters model

    • MISTRAL_NEMO

      public static final OllamaModel MISTRAL_NEMO
      A 12B model with 128k context length, built by Mistral AI in collaboration with NVIDIA.

    • MOONDREAM

      public static final OllamaModel MOONDREAM
      A small vision language model designed to run efficiently on edge devices.

    • DOLPHIN_PHI

      public static final OllamaModel DOLPHIN_PHI
      The 2.7B uncensored Dolphin model

    • PHI

      public static final OllamaModel PHI
      The Phi-2 2.7B language model

      public static final OllamaModel PHI3
      The Phi-3 3.8B language model

    • STARLING_LM

      public static final OllamaModel STARLING_LM
      Starling-7B model

    • CODELLAMA

      public static final OllamaModel CODELLAMA
      Code Llama is based on Llama 2 model

    • ORCA_MINI

      public static final OllamaModel ORCA_MINI
      Orca Mini is based on Llama and Llama 2 ranging from 3 billion parameters to 70 billion

    • LLAVA

      public static final OllamaModel LLAVA
      Llava is a Large Language and Vision Assistant model

    • GEMMA

      public static final OllamaModel GEMMA
      Gemma is a lightweight model with 2 billion and 7 billion

    • GEMMA3

      public static final OllamaModel GEMMA3
      The current, most capable model that runs on a single GPU.

    • LLAMA2_UNCENSORED

      public static final OllamaModel LLAMA2_UNCENSORED
      Uncensored Llama 2 model

    • NOMIC_EMBED_TEXT

      public static final OllamaModel NOMIC_EMBED_TEXT
      A high-performing open embedding model with a large token context window.

    • MXBAI_EMBED_LARGE

      public static final OllamaModel MXBAI_EMBED_LARGE
      State-of-the-art large embedding model from mixedbread.ai

    • QWEN3_EMBED_8B

      public static final OllamaModel QWEN3_EMBED_8B
      A multilingual text embedding model with 8B parameters. Supports 100+ languages and features a 32k context window. It offers a high embedding dimension of up to 4096, which supports user-defined output dimensions ranging from 32 to 4096.

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static OllamaModel[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static OllamaModel valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
